title: "She’s for the streets": Laura Loomer’s latest attack pulls Candace Owens’ family into escalating political feud
summary_full: The feud between Candace Owens and Laura Loomer has escalated, with Loomer targeting Owens’ father-in-law, Michael Farmer. The conflict turned personal after Owens referenced Loomer’s husband, prompting a sharp response. Loomer’s remarks have drawn attention to Farmer’s background, though neither he nor Owens has publicly addressed the situation as the controversy continues to grow online.
